hero.line1: Explore the haunted village with your team.
hero.line2: Survive the night and uncover the curse.

coop.title: Co-op Gameplay
coop.description: Play with friends, coordinate your moves, and survive the village together.

lobby.title: Lobby & Pre-game System
lobby.description: Create rooms, invite friends, chat, and get ready before the match begins.

objective.title: Objective-Based Progression
objective.description: Explore areas, solve puzzles, and complete tasks to keep the session moving.

mapMonster.title: Multi-Map & Monster System
mapMonster.description: Each map brings its own setting, monsters, and gameplay flow for a different run every time.

intro.title: GhostVillage is a co-op survival horror game set in a cursed village.
intro.description: Enter the village, hunt clues, and survive the night with your squad.

explore.label: Exploration
explore.title: Scout the haunted village
explore.description: Walk the streets, read the environment, and uncover what still moves after dark.

survival.label: Survival
survival.title: Hold out until dawn
survival.description: Manage tension, stay alert, and keep your team alive when the curse escalates.

coop.label: Co-op
coop.title: Move as a squad
coop.description: Split tasks, call out danger, and make every run better with a coordinated team.

lore.label: Lore
lore.title: Piece together the story
lore.description: Collect notes, relics, and clues that reveal how the village fell apart.

events.label: Live events
events.title: Face rotating encounters
events.description: Jump into seasonal hunts, special bosses, and limited-time challenges.

modes.title: Three ways to enter the darkness
modes.description: Pick the tempo that fits your group and the kind of fear you want tonight.

story.label: Story mode
story.title: Follow the cursed trail
story.description: Experience the main chapters and uncover the village origin at your own pace.

hunt.label: Night hunt
hunt.title: Run co-op raids
hunt.description: Enter high-pressure sessions with friends and clear objectives before the dark closes in.

investigation.label: Investigation
investigation.title: Track every clue
investigation.description: Read map notes, compare evidence, and link the strange events together.

workflow.title: Start the hunt in four steps
workflow.description: The loop is simple: load in, choose your role, move through the village, and survive the night.

step1.title: Download the build
step1.description: Open the game client and grab the latest version before you enter.

step2.title: Pick your role
step2.description: Choose a playstyle that fits how you want to handle danger and support the squad.

step3.title: Enter the village
step3.description: Move through cursed streets, search buildings, and gather the clues you need.

step4.title: Survive and extract
step4.description: Complete the objective, stay together, and get out before the night wins.

cta.title: Enter GhostVillage and start the hunt.
cta.description: The homepage now reads like the front door to the game: a clear premise, play styles, and the path to your first night.

support.title: Submit Support Ticket
support.subtitle: Describe your issue and our admin team will review it soon.
support.historyEmpty: You have no support tickets yet.
support.activeTicketsHint: These tickets are still being handled.
support.activeTicketsEmpty: No tickets are being processed right now.
support.archivedTicketsHint: Click a ticket to open the full conversation.
support.archivedTicketsEmpty: No tickets in this section yet.
support.subjectPlaceholder: Enter a short summary of your issue
support.subjectValidation: Subject must be between 5 and 150 characters
support.messageValidation: Details must be between 15 and 3000 characters
support.attachmentsHint: You can attach up to {{max}} images
support.attachmentsCacheNote: Images are kept locally for preview and will be uploaded to Cloudinary when you submit the ticket.
support.attachmentsLimit: You can attach up to {{max}} images

errors.notFoundMessage: The page you are looking for doesn't exist.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.autoDeleteNote: Notifications after 15 days will be deleted automatically.

keep.message: We reviewed the {{entityType}} you reported and no further action is needed.

remove.message: We reviewed the {{entityType}} you reported and removed it under community guidelines.

moderationNotice.title: Moderation notice
moderationNotice.noViolation: Your {{entityType}} was reviewed and no clear violation was found.
moderationNotice.warning: Your {{entityType}} was reviewed under community guidelines. A reminder has been applied to your account in line with community guidelines.
moderationNotice.mute: Your account is temporarily restricted from posting and commenting for {{duration}}.
moderationNotice.mergedHideOnly: Some of your content visibility has been limited to protect the community.
moderationNotice.default: Please follow community guidelines to avoid stricter moderation actions.

contentRestored.title: Content restored
contentRestored.messageWithNote: Your {{entityType}} has been restored by {{moderatorName}}. Moderator note: "{{recoveryReason}}"

toasts.friendRequest: You have a new friend request.
toasts.ticketReplied: Your support ticket has a new reply.
